---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Charles Frederick Mackenzie"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Charles Frederick Mackenzie

**Dates:** (1825-1862)

### Description

Bishop of the Zambezi, brother of Anne Mackenzie

### Biography

[ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 15th 1894
- Letter from Feb 6th [1894]
- Letter from Jan 31 [1894]   
- Letter from June 17th 1876
- Letter from May 8th 1867
- Letter from [July 1866]
- Letter from April 4th [1866]
- Letter from Jany 12th [1863]
- Letter from [November 1862]
- Letter from July 13th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
